task_completion.description: Apply warm wood finish hardwood flooring to the living room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting a warm wood flooring material and applying it to the floor of the living room in DreamPlan.

task_completion.description: Apply the same warm wood finish hardwood flooring to at least one bedroom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent applying the exact same warm wood flooring material used in the living room to the floor of at least one bedroom.

task_completion.description: Apply ceramic or stone tile flooring to the kitchen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting a ceramic or stone tile material (not wood) and applying it to the kitchen floor.

task_completion.description: Update the wall color or material in at least one room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting a wall in any room and changing its color or material using the paint or materials tool.

task_completion.description: Export a 3D rendered view to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent in a 3D view mode, using the export/save image function, and saving the file as 'renovation_3d_view.jpg' to the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Export a 2D floor plan view to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent in a 2D floor plan view mode, using the export/save image function, and saving the file as 'renovation_floor_plan.jpg' to the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Save the modified project file to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent saving the DreamPlan project file to the Documents folder. Note: The expected filename is 'renovation_proposal.dpn' or 'renovation.dpn'.

integrity.description: The agent used the DreamPlan GUI to apply materials and export files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the DreamPlan application interface (menus, material palettes, 2D/3D views) rather than using terminal commands to generate files.

integrity.description: The exported images are genuine outputs from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually triggers the export/save image functionality within DreamPlan, rather than downloading external images or creating empty files via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires saving the project file; the verified expected path is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\renovation_proposal.dpn (accept variations like renovation.dpn). The 3D view must be saved to Desktop\renovation_3d_view.jpg (minimum 30 KB) and the floor plan to Desktop\renovation_floor_plan.jpg (minimum 10 KB). These size thresholds ensure the exported images are genuine renders and not blank files.
